name: Hunan New Wellful Co.,Ltd.
summary: Hunan New Wellful Co.,Ltd. primarily engages in the breeding and supplying of pigs. It is also involved in feed, raw material trade, slaughter, cold chain logistics, pig trading, cold meat processing and sale, and breeding equipment businesses. The company offers its products under the U fresh and Chenfeng brand names in China, Hong Kong, and Macau. Hunan New Wellful Co.,Ltd. was founded in 2001 and is headquartered in Changsha, China.
